mapper.update: update t_asset set deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} where asset_id = #{assetId}
mapper.select:
select * from t_asset where deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} and asset_id in
#{item}
select * from t_asset where deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} and location_id = #{locationId} and enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
select * from t_asset where deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} and enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
